items.title: The Lakers don't look like a contender. Neither did the '24 Mavs
items.body_excerpt: Los Angeles has bet big on Luka Magic. That bet has generally worked out in the past. Good morning. It's Free Newsletter Wednesday, and I think I'm going to say something nice about ... the Lakers. Ugh. Let's basketball. The Lakers' Walker Kessler deal is textbook overpayment.…
